name: Samantha Gross, Chris Van Hollen for US Senate
subject: following up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

I have never been prouder to work for Chris Van Hollen than I was this week. He is always standing up for what is right. He led the fight to keep the government open. He's been the point person fighting back against Paul Ryan's disastrous budget that disinvests in America - hurting our kids' schools, undermining our economic growth, and breaking promises to seniors. **[And now he needs our help before a huge end-of-month deadline. Can you chip in now?](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f99/70cdc2ba/47b42ea7/3966854/740828079/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom1015?refcode=em103015_3&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+And+now+he+needs+our+help+before+a+huge+&utm_campaign=em103015_3&source=em103015_3")**

I was just looking through the list of supporters who have chipped in to help us before Saturday's midnight deadline--but I don't see your name. [](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f99/70cdc2ba/47b42ea7/3966855/740828079/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom1015?refcode=em103015_3&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em103015_3&source=em103015_3") Here, use this link to chip in $25 or more right now, and I'll add your name: **[action.vanhollen.org/october](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f99/70cdc2ba/47b42ea7/3966852/740828079/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom1015?refcode=em103015_3&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+actionvanhollenorgoctober&utm_campaign=em103015_3&source=em103015_3")**

The primary is just six months away, and the general election is only a year away. We have a lot to do before then, and we really need your help. Chris has been fighting tirelessly for us in Congress--including stopping a HUGE increase in Medicare premiums that would have harmed millions of seniors.

It's time for us to fight for him, too. And don't forget--every gift we receive between now and midnight Saturday will be matched, so you can see why this is such a big deal for us.

Chip in and help out. We really need your support: **[action.vanhollen.org/october](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91f99/70cdc2ba/47b42ea7/3966853/740828079/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh_eom1015?refcode=em103015_3&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+actionvanhollenorgoctober&utm_campaign=em103015_3&source=em103015_3")**

Samantha

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate

subject: (Sorry it's Saturday) FWD:: One day more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016
body:
Did you see my message? Today is the final day. Friend - I know it's a Saturday AND Halloween, but I needed to make sure you saw my message yesterday.

**Today is the final day to help.[Will you please chip in now, before midnight?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31348375:Wll0uNyND:m:1:877327319:7673AB3DAE7B7392243825F1EE682616:r)**

Thanks,

Lindsey

* * *
**From:** Lindsey Graham 2016
**Date:** Friday, October 30, 2015 at 1:40 PM
**Subject:** One day more

Friend - can you please chip in $10 or more right now to my campaign for president?

My debate performance on Wednesday night resonated with thousands - if not millions - of Americans. **Fifty-four percent of the debate watchers in the CNBC poll and an overwhelming majority of news accounts indicated I won the debate:**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31348375:Wll0uNyND:m:1:877327319:7673AB3DAE7B7392243825F1EE682616:r)

Since then, many supporters have reached out and said that _**this is our campaign's moment to rise and succeed**_. I could not agree more, but the road ahead won't be easy unless I have your support.

**We have one day to make that happen.**

[**Your donation before tomorrow's end of month deadline**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31348375:Wll0uNyND:m:1:877327319:7673AB3DAE7B7392243825F1EE682616:r) will go immediately toward funding the costs of running a national campaign and will ensure Americans hear my strong national security message and plans for our great country.

If you have ever considered supporting our campaign, now is the time to do so. I need to capitalize on the momentum coming off Wednesday's debate, and our campaign must close out October with the strongest fundraising numbers possible.

So, Friend, I'm asking you this: _Can I count on you?_

If the answer is yes, I hope you will [**show your support by making a financial contribution right now.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31348375:Wll0uNyND:m:1:877327319:7673AB3DAE7B7392243825F1EE682616:r)

Thank you for your support! The best is yet to come!

Lindsey

PS. I need your help to build on the momentum coming out of Wednesday's debate and take our message to more voters across the country. **Friend, October is quickly coming to a close, and I need your support before it does.** If you agree that we need an experienced and proven leader in the White House, then I hope you will show your support by donating to my campaign right away. [**Please follow this link to donate before tomorrow at midnight.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31348375:Wll0uNyND:m:1:877327319:7673AB3DAE7B7392243825F1EE682616:r) Thank you.

[** Quick Donate Here >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31348376:Wll0uNyND:m:1:877327319:7673AB3DAE7B7392243825F1EE682616:r)

name: Ben Carson
subject: Building support in your state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
|

Peter, there are campaigns and there are movements.

We are building a movement because that's what it will take to defeat Hillary Clinton and re-establish a government that is truly of, by and for the people.

**So you can imagine how thrilled we were to learn that we just surpassed Hillary Clinton as the top Iowa fundraiser, raising more money from more people in that crucial state.

**This is important because it means we're building a deeply-rooted base of grassroots support that will allow us to go the distance -- and win.

**Now we're working to grow our support in your state, and we need about 25 more people to make a small donation before our October fundraising deadline.

[I know you haven't yet donated online, but we could really use your help today.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31361636:sOA9VNyND:m:1:876315805:D3767B2CC3566A902073AD38560205E7:r)**

As we saw in Wednesday night's debate, the media is going to make it as hard as possible for us to get our message out, and your resources allow us to go right to the people.

[**I hope you'll consider making a donation by the end of the day.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31361636:sOA9VNyND:m:1:876315805:D3767B2CC3566A902073AD38560205E7:r)

Thank you for playing such an integral role in our movement to revive America.

Sincerely,

Ben

name: Katie McGinty
subject: I’m asking you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

Since we first reached out and asked you to chip in before our end of month deadline, the donations have been pouring in.

These kinds of small-dollar donations are what keep my campaign going. Republican Pat Toomey may have the billionaire Koch brothers funding him, but we have hardworking folks from across Pennsylvania by our side. And I wouldn't have it any other way.

**It 's the last day before our end of month deadline, and we're just 56 new donors short of our goal.**

That means I need you now. I'm not going to ask the Koch brothers to fund this campaign, and I'm not appealing to special interest groups to give money in exchange for votes that will benefit them later on.

I'm asking _you_.

[**So please, help my team make it over the finish line. Chip in just $5 today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8829413825166966784/3557301646390198272?refcode=e20151031nd&amount=5)

Sincerely,

Katie

body:
Friend - did you catch Jeb's email?

He's reached out twice now, and he's looking forward to hearing back.

With our dollar for dollar match on every donation that comes in, this is a great opportunity for you to step up.

[**But with only 12 hours to go, we 're still $9,244 short of our goal of $50,000. Will you stand with Jeb by chipping in $50, $25, $5 or even $1 right now?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/npfhgtkmjpdnwbwqntzhjncbkkncmbgmhtrtdmbydddq_gtlrrnmw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Friend, Jeb needs you TODAY. This is a crucial deadline and with less than 100 days to go before voting begins, the stakes couldn't be higher.

**It 's go time, Friend. You know what to do:**

[**Jeb2016.com/Stand-With-Jeb/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ufqbvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjqnnnq_gtlrrnmw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[**Please step up in the next 12 hours with a donation of $50, $25, $5 or even $1 and have your gift doubled.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/gtcqskmpntrdwfwcdkhqndjfmmdjpfspqklkrpfyrrrg_gtlrrnmw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

\-- Team Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/xbglkpcqsbrtgygdtpmlstnycctnqykqlpjprqyvrrrp_gtlrrnmw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Jeb Bush
Date: October 30, 2015
Subject: Friend, please**

Friend,

I know I emailed you already, but I'm following up because this is our most important fundraising deadline yet.

**[With only 1 day to go until the biggest deadline of this campaign, please rush your donation of $100, $50, $5 or whatever you can afford and have your gift matched by a generous group of donors.](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ebqljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcsbbbb_gtlrrnmw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

We're less than 100 days out from the Iowa caucuses now. **If we don 't reach our goal of $50,000 by tomorrow night at midnight, we'll have fewer resources to reach voters in Iowa and beyond.**

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/ljqpsdhcqnjrzlzmrdypqrflhhrfclscpdwdjclkjjjn_gtlrrnmw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Katie just asked me for the latest update on our October fundraising. I ran the numbers just now, and it looks like we’re only 32 donors short of our goal.

I’m going to head into a final check-in meeting with Katie and our Finance Director Josh in a little less than an hour, and I want to be able to tell them that we not only hit our goal, we surpassed it.

Will you chip in $5 right now?

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/km-october-goal?refcode=e20151031nd.3&amount=5

Thanks,

Jordyn Rush
Deputy Campaign Manager

--- Forwarded message ---
To: Jordyn
From: Katie
Subj: How close are we?

Jordyn,

How are we doing on the goal? Can we send one final email?

- KAM

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/173498639895756800/8818350436089069568.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

subject: Before you head out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jindal For President
body:
|
---
| | I know that we have been emailing you a lot lately, but I wanted to talk to you before you head out for Halloween.

If you share my vision for America, if you believe in the importance of family and freedom, then [I need you to show your support now](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=a90e431758&e=724c64cfa7). **With just over three months left until the Iowa Caucus, this is one of the most critical times of the campaign.**

We are getting close to our goal for the month, but we still have ground to cover. We need you to do your part today, not tomorrow – _**TODAY**_.

I asked my staff to send this email only to the people who read our messages frequently, _so I know you believe in this campaign._

We are getting close to finalizing our plan to win the Iowa Caucus, and [I need to know you stand with me before midnight tonight.](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=477f23bc05&e=724c64cfa7)

Thank you,

Bobby Jindal
